parameters.content:
## Ten80Ten Auto-Publisher v2

### Architecture
Each platform is its own Code node in a sequential chain.
Data flows left-to-right: post data + accumulated `_results` array.
Each node checks if its platform is in the post's platforms list,
publishes (or skips), appends result, and passes forward.

### Flow
```
Schedule (5min)
  -> Supabase: Get approved_scheduled
  -> Code: Filter by CST datetime
  -> SplitInBatches (1 post at a time)
    -> Supabase: Mark as posted (lock)
    -> Code: Publish Facebook
    -> Code: Publish Instagram
    -> Code: Publish LinkedIn
    -> Code: Build Audit Entry
    -> Supabase: Log to audit trail
    -> Loop back
```

### Setup Checklist
- [ ] Create Supabase credential (URL + Service Role Key)
- [ ] Apply credential to all 3 Supabase nodes
- [ ] Edit Publish Facebook: set FB_TOKEN and FB_PAGE
- [ ] Edit Publish Instagram: set IG_TOKEN and IG_USER
- [ ] Edit Publish LinkedIn: set LI_TOKEN and LI_ORG
- [ ] Ensure Drive files have 'Anyone with link' sharing
- [ ] Run Manual Test before activating schedule

## Per-Platform Nodes

| Node | Platform | API | Content Types |
|------|----------|-----|---------------|
| Publish Facebook | FB Page | Graph API v21 | Image, Video, Reel |
| Publish Instagram | IG Business | Container/Poll/Publish | Image, Video, Reel, Carousel |
| Publish LinkedIn | LI Org | Register/Upload/UGC | Image |

### Why Separate Nodes?
- Green/red status per platform on canvas
- Debug one platform without touching others
- Disconnect a node to disable that platform
- Each node is ~60 lines, not 250

### Adding X / YouTube / TikTok
1. Duplicate any platform Code node
2. Replace API logic inside
3. Insert between Publish LinkedIn and Build Audit Entry
4. Read `_results`, append your result, pass forward

### Token Refresh (every ~60 days)
- Meta: Graph API Explorer -> generate -> exchange for long-lived
- LinkedIn: OAuth2 refresh flow
- Update the constants at the top of each Code node

## Error Handling & Safety

### Per-Platform Isolation
Every platform node wraps API calls in try/catch.
Facebook failing does NOT block Instagram or LinkedIn.
`onError: continueRegularOutput` on all platform nodes.

### Duplicate Prevention
Posts marked `posted` BEFORE publishing starts.
If n8n crashes mid-publish, post will NOT retry.
To retry: change stage back to `approved_scheduled` in portal.

### Instagram Polling
IG containers (especially video/carousel) need processing time.
The node polls status every 5s, up to 30 attempts (150s max).
If container fails or times out, error is logged but other
platforms still proceed.

### Audit Trail
Every execution logs to `post_audit_logs`:
- Which platforms succeeded
- Which failed (with error messages)
- Which were skipped (not in platform list)
